arts.ttl: Scotland vs Portugal LIVE: Nations League team news as Scots look to end losing run against Cristiano Ronaldo
arts.sum: The Scots have never lost five games in a row in their history as they welcome Portugal and Cristiano Ronaldo to Hampden

arts.sum: The Dark Blues will need a favour from Hungary after defeat to Belgium at Tynecastle last time out

arts.ttl: How to watch Scotland v Portugal for free tonight with game not on TV
arts.sum: The Tartan Army welcome Cristiano Ronaldo and his Portugal team-mates to Hampden for a Nations League showdown. Here's how you can watch the game

arts.ttl: Scotland vs Portugal: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Portugal are aiming to maintain a 100% start to their UEFA Nations League campaign when they take on the point-less Scotland at Hampden Park on Tuesday night. They head into this fixture having downed Poland 3-1 in Warsaw on Saturday as Cristiano Ronaldo scored goal number 133 for his country.

arts.ttl: Arsenal dream ruined? Gyokeres scandal erupts in Portugal
arts.sum: Ahead of the match, a video leaked on social media showing Gyokeres and his Sporting teammates in a club smoking a hookah and a bit of a scandal has erupted about this in Portugal. Viktor Gyokeres was caught on tape smoking a hookah and this has caused outrage in the Portuguese media.

arts.ttl: Dejan Kulusevski reveals advice Cristiano Ronaldo once gave him while at Juventus - but the Tottenham star took four years to digest it
arts.sum: Kulusevski played alongside Ronaldo for the Old Lady in the 2020-21 season before the latter made his blockbuster return to Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo mobbed at St Mirren training ground as overwhelmed punter makes bizarre comment about his HAIR
arts.sum: Each to their own, I suppose! One punter was well impressed by Ronaldo's hair...

arts.ttl: Andy Robertson's furious confrontation with Cristiano Ronaldo after 'losing his head'
arts.sum: Andy Robertson could go face to face with Cristiano Ronaldo on Tuesday, three years after being involved in a furious confrontation with the then Manchester United star
